title: UI Performance: AI-Generated Static Background vs. CPU-Heavy Canvas
summary: Replacing resource-intensive Canvas (with blur filters and noise) with AI-generated static imagery plus lightweight CSS overlays eliminates FPS drops on marketing hero sections while maintaining premium B2B aesthetics.

steps_summary: detect performance bottleneck in canvas rendering
verify smooth scroll and low CPU utilization

anti_patterns: Generating pixel noise via putImageData on Every Frame
notes: Proven to fix FPS lag in high-impact hero sections without sacrificing premium look.
